name: Exhausting Hex
description: You place a curse that causes overwhelming fatigue. Target must make a Wisdom saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion and have their movement speed reduced by 10 feet for the duration.
notes: On a failed Wisdom save the target suffers one level of exhaustion and -10 ft movement for 1 hour (no concentration).
Exhaustion condition: engine support pending — see spell-mechanics-proposals.md.
The non-concentration 1-hour hard debuff makes this a very powerful L1 spell; mana 3 and a rune cost are warranted.
